rationale: The pre-fetched privacy policy discloses on-device camera use for receipt scanning, which is exactly what the code does; there is no location, tracking, or health usage to contradict it.

fetched_urls.privacy_policy:
BillFold Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 2026

Camera: BillFold uses your camera solely to scan receipts. Images are processed on your device with the Vision framework and are never uploaded.

What we store: scanned totals and merchant names stay in the app's local database on your device.

What we do not do: no analytics SDKs, no advertising identifiers, no location access, no data sharing with third parties.

Contact: privacy@billfold.example
